<?php /** * Raw EC Signature Handler * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\Formats\Signature; use phpseclib3\Crypt\Common\Formats\Signature\Raw as Progenitor; /** * Raw DSA Signature Handler * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class Raw extends Progenitor { }
